alert: The load balancer is returning frequent 502s for product pages.
root_cause: cache service crashed causing web upstream failures

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:load_balancer: Load balancer logs show 502s from web backends rather than edge health failures.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:web_server: Web logs show upstream cache calls failing.
evidence_descriptions.check_status:cache: Cache status is crashed, which is the root cause.

logs: WARN upstream response reset by backend
ERROR upstream cache request failed reason=connection_refused

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(cache service crashed causing web upstream failures, restart cache service)
distractors: Load balancer 502s are symptoms; changing edge config will not restore cache.
